name: Deficiency Dividend Deduction

eligibility.description: Must be triggered by a court order, closing agreement, or signed agreement with the Secretary; distribution must occur within 90 days of determination and a claim filed within 120 days.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a corporation to avoid PHC tax liability after an IRS determination by distributing dividends to shareholders within 90 days.
